depression.description: I feel completely overwhelmed by the job search process. Every rejection email just reinforces my belief that I'm a failure and that I'll never find a job.
I can't seem to stop criticizing myself. I constantly think about how incompetent I am, and it makes me feel even more hopeless.
I have these conflicting feelings about Ivan's career. I want to support him, but I can't help feeling frustrated that he's not ambitious enough, which makes me question my own worth.
I worry that I'm not living up to the expectations of my family, especially my father. It feels like I'm letting everyone down, including myself.

depression.topic: Sense of failure in personal life
depression.description: I feel like I'm failing in my marriage because of my own insecurities and the pressure I put on both myself and Ivan to succeed.
